BRAICH, THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D)&(E). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 4/9/12 AT 11:15AM IN DEPT. 503. LAST DAY OF HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS IS 3/29/12. ALL DATES RELATING TO SUMMARY MOTIONS ARE PER THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. PARTIES MAY APPEAR VIA COURTCALL. NO LATER THAN 12/30/11, PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. ALL CUT-OFF DATES RELATING TO FACT AND EXPERT DISCOVERY IS 4/9/12. NO LATER THAN 1/6/12, DEFENDANTS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ANY PERSON NOT IDENTIFIED ON THE STATEMENTS WILL BE BARRED FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL OR PRESENTING A DECLARATION ON SUMMARY JUDGMENT ABSENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN.
